title: Its so pretty
wikitext:
[]: Its so pretty             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Thu Jul 27, 2006 9:56 pm Isnt the jacket pretty?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu Jul 27, 2006 10:19 pm umm NO

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Thu Jul 27, 2006 10:21 pm I think the back with the ghoasted image of unit 01 is awsome

[]:             Quote Post by Satsume » Thu Jul 27, 2006 10:29 pm That's the 10th Anniversary jacket? Well, it doesn't really suit my tastes.. but it's pretty okay! I probably won't end up getting it though. xD

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Thu Jul 27, 2006 11:27 pm Eh... Not $200 pretty. I think I'd rather just go to the mall.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Thu Jul 27, 2006 11:29 pm Timstuff wrote: Eh... Not $200 pretty. I think I'd rather just go to the mall.

[]:             Quote Post by System Shocker » Thu Jul 27, 2006 11:42 pm Looks like duct tape. What do you guys think is better? oh, and where did you find those two pictures of the 10th Anniversary jackets?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Jul 28, 2006 1:35 pm Here are some more images, from some sort of ad off of a NewType USA DVD.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Fri Jul 28, 2006 1:41 pm Hey Monkey Im planing to rip the trailer if you need it! Or if anyone else needs it.

[]:             Quote Post by System Shocker » Fri Jul 28, 2006 8:30 pm

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Jul 28, 2006 8:48 pm System Shocker wrote: I really don't like that little new logo. It looks photoshopped. And way too damn small.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Fri Jul 28, 2006 11:03 pm That jacket looks ghetto.

[]:             Quote Post by darth_mark » Sat Jul 29, 2006 12:23 am hm. normally i wouldn't mind wearing things that say "i'm a geek." but this one just says "i'm a sucker."

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Sat Jul 29, 2006 6:41 am System Shocker wrote: It looks photoshopped.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Sun Jul 30, 2006 1:17 am A cheap jacket and a tacky bumper sticker aren't worth $250 IMO. Seriously, that jacket looks like you could find it for $20 or less at Wal-Mart if not for the Evangelion logos. And no-one but the dorkiest of dorks will actually put that bumper sticker on their car.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sun Jul 30, 2006 7:10 am If I actually do buy the 10th Ann. box set I will probably burn the sticker and throw the jacket down in my basement with the rest of the other clothes I don't wear.

[]:             Quote Post by Dimmi » Sun Jul 30, 2006 8:10 am hehe oh I'd totally put the bumper sticker on my car ;) I collect dorky bumpers (0-60 in 15 minutes! etc)....besides, they help keep my poor old car together :shock:

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Sun Jul 30, 2006 9:57 am The jackets okay. I thought those were cherries on the front.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Sun Jul 30, 2006 8:15 pm That's not satin, is it?

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Sun Jul 30, 2006 9:13 pm Looks more like nylon.
summary:

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu Jul 27, 2006 10:19 pm umm NO

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Thu Jul 27, 2006 10:21 pm I think the back with the ghoasted image of unit 01 is awsome
